title: Zediaph 3D Texture Pack

body:

Get **25% off** your first month when purchasing a Minecraft server with BisectHosting! Use promo code **zediaph** at checkout.
[https://bisecthosting.com/zediaph](https://bisecthosting.com/zediaph)

The resource pack for the YouTuber Zediaph! 

# **📖 What's this texture pack?**

A totem of undying is an uncommon combat item that can save holders from death. It is dropped by evokers, which spawn in woodland mansions and raids. And this texture pack uses Zediaph's 3D Minecraft skin and completely changes Minecraft's totem of undying item.

# 📥 Installation Guide
1. Download Zediaph's 3D Texture Pack
   - Click on the "Download Texture Pack" button to download the `.zip` file.

2. **Locate Your Minecraft Resource Pack Folder**
   - Open Minecraft and go to `Options` > `Resource Packs` > `Open Resource Pack Folder`.
   - Alternatively, you can manually navigate to the folder:
     - **Windows**: `C:\Users\[Your Username]\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks`
     - **Mac**: `~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/resourcepacks`
     - **Linux**: `~/.minecraft/resourcepacks`

3. **Move the Downloaded File**
   - Move the downloaded `.zip` file into the `resourcepacks` folder.

4. **Activate the Texture Pack**
   - Go back to Minecraft.
   - In the `Resource Packs` menu, you should see the Zediaph Totem Pack 3D listed under "Available Resource Packs".
   - Click the arrow to move it to the "Selected Resource Packs" section.
   - Click `Done` to apply the texture pack.

5. **Enjoy Your New Texture Pack**
   - Start or join a game to see the new textures in action!

If you encounter any issues or need further assistance, feel free to ask! Enjoy your new Zediaph's 3D totem textures!
